mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xeus.crms_prev_avi As avi
avi.rqst_mgr_seq = #{rqstMgrSeq}::numeric
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xeus.crms_prev_avi ( mgr_seq, rqst_mgr_seq, cctv_mgr_no, sec_st_dat, sec_ed_dat, play_limit_cnt, play_limit_dat, avi_conts_id, mac_serial, hdd_serial, bak_stat_cd ) VALUES ( #{mgrSeq}::numeric, #{rqstMgrSeq}::numeric, #{cctvMgrNo}, #{secStDat}, #{secEdDat}, #{playLimitCnt}::numeric, #{playLimitDat}, #{aviContsId}, #{macSerial}, #{hddSerial}, #{bakStatCd} );
